fields.description: Optional subset of response fields to return, each a dot-path from the allowlist. Omit to return all fields. Request only the fields your task needs to keep responses small.

source_type.description: Comma-separated source type(s) to return config for, e.g. 'Postgres' or 'Postgres,Stripe'. Strongly recommended: the unfiltered response describes every supported source and is very large. Omit only to enumerate the available types.
